reviews.comment:
Está para una pequeña parada de emergencia. O sea tomar algo fresco a las 4 de la tarde con todos los demás lugares cerrados.

(Translated by Google)
It's perfect for a quick emergency stop. Like, grabbing something cold at 4 pm when everywhere else is closed.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
